code: import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const toneByStatus={ACTIVE:'success',BLOCKED:'danger',PENDING:'warning',PENDING_VERIFICATION:'warning',REVIEWED:'secondary',PASS:'success',FAIL:'danger',DISABLED:'secondary'};const labelByStatus={ACTIVE:'Active',BLOCKED:'Blocked',PENDING:'Pending',PENDING_VERIFICATION:'Pending verification',REVIEWED:'Reviewed',PASS:'Pass',FAIL:'Fail',DISABLED:'Disabled'};export default function StatusBadge(_ref){let status=_ref.status;const normalized=String(status||'UNKNOWN').toUpperCase();const tone=toneByStatus[normalized]||'secondary';const label=labelByStatus[normalized]||normalized;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"badge text-bg-".concat(tone),children:label});}
